projectDescription: A macOS menu bar voice input app that lets you press a hotkey, speak naturally, and have your transcribed text instantly inserted into any focused app.
keyFeatures: Hold-to-talk hotkey workflow with instant text insertion into any focused app
Streaming transcription preview with floating overlay UI
Voice-driven text rewriting and editing of selected text
Multiple STT backends: Apple Speech, Whisper API, local models (WhisperKit, SenseVoice, Qwen3), Alibaba Cloud, Doubao, Groq
OpenAI-compatible and Ollama LLM backends for rewrite and ask-selection workflows
Fully local, privacy-first pipeline with optional cloud providers
Configurable personas for custom rewriting styles
MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool integration for the agent framework
Session history with retry support and audio playback
Persona picker overlay with hotkey-driven selection
publicApiSurface: STTProvider enum: freeModel, whisperAPI, appleSpeech, localModel, multimodalLLM, aliCloud, doubaoRealtime, groq
HistoryStore protocol: save(record:), list(), delete(id:), purge(olderThanDays:), exportMarkdown()
MCPClient protocol: connect(), disconnect(), listTools(), callTool(name:arguments:)
